honest_issues: No fresh current-writer physical-device sidecar or upload trace exists. The located 2026-07-02 device sidecar validates but predates the current writer; this does not close the North Star physical product exit gate.
The exact required swift test command cannot compile Package.swift in this sandbox because ~/.cache/clang/ModuleCache is not writable. The manager must rerun it locally.
The wide pytest suite retains seven proven pre-existing sandbox/storage failures rather than being literally zero-failure.
Swift golden equality is decoded-normalized JSON equality, not byte equality, because JSON ordering and whitespace are non-semantic.
Server upload routes do not independently parse the sidecar; they forward opaque JSON bytes to the strict Python pipeline. No competing server-side shape was found.
Provenance remains optional in Python because historical Python-built sidecars omit it; new Swift output always encodes typed live_recording or camera_roll_import provenance.
Best-stack delta: none; no model, weights, or policy defaults changed.
